chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-237 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4004/24 3.For hearing of main case 27-05-2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for respondents No.2&3. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
